entries.description: Operator set pathAwareCritique: required.
Operator set contractGate: none.
Authored ai-assignment.md via routed analysis (Step 3.5)

Three-layer baseline: L1 pytest 2268 passed/5 skipped/0 failed; L2 tsc --noEmit clean, mocha 906 passing/4 failing (2 = golden drift from set-authoring commit, fixed inline by UPDATE_GOLDEN regen; 2 = standing local-only failures never run in CI: configEditor-foundation ViewColumn stub gap, notificationsSection stale disabled-button assertion) -> post-fix CI spec pair 22 passing/0 failing; L3 playwright running. Master Test run 28569747256 (set-authoring commit) was RED on the golden drift; inline fix restores green.
Routed code-review bundle a-wizard-prompts
Routed code-review bundle b-providers-utils
Routed code-review bundle c-start-runtime
Routed code-review bundle d-close
Routed code-review bundle e-dedicated-verification
Routed code-review bundle f-session-state

Triage complete: A1-A12 all confirmed against code (A1 rationale-fabrication leg re-characterized: tierGuidance is gated, so the palette path emits Full exemplars with NO tier guidance rather than a fabricated rationale). orchestrator.provider hard-confirmed persisted omit-null at all 3 writers; --provider optional. Critique-2 (GPT-5.4, SOUND-WITH-CHANGES) M1-M7 folded into spec. Routed bundles A-F triaged: 2 false positives refuted by orchestrator (plan-less TypeError - ProgressView.total_sessions is always int; unreadable-record warning fires only on existing corrupt file), 2 refuted by auto-verifier (ui-abstraction hardening item; repair Case-4 redundancy). Inline fixes: UnicodeError sibling closure x3 in dedicated_verification (L-069-1), runtime_mode lazy-import pattern, CSP nonce CSPRNG, planImport fs guards, kickoff prompt path quoting, fileSystem minors (case-sensitive dedup key, integer guard, dead null check, shadow rename), sessionGenPrompt void x3, copyPromptCommands dead try-catch. Fold-forward: close_session hardening -> S4; session_state atomic-write class -> S4 step 5; dedicated_verification atomic writes + derive_state ambiguity -> S5 step 6; progressText plusFraction -> S5; typed-session capture gaps -> S5.

Wrote s1-review-findings.md (baseline, A1-A12 triage with evidence, provider hard-confirm, critique-2 fold table, bundle A-F classification: 13 inline fixes / 10 fold-forward items / 4 refuted / 7 deferred-with-reason); spec.md amended in place for every fold (marked Critique-2 Mn / S1 review bundle X).

Post-fix full pass: pytest 2268 passed/5 skipped/0 failed; npx tsc --noEmit clean; mocha 910 passing/0 failing; Playwright CI-green at baseline commit (local parallel flake documented, all specs pass serially). routed_gate on the session diff: REQUIRED (blast-radius, multi-module, breadth) -> Step 6 routed verification runs.
Cross-provider session verification: verdict=ISSUES_FOUND, 1 issue(s), blocking=True
Round-2 narrow re-verify of S077-S1-V1-001 (realpath dedup): verdict=VERIFIED, blocking=False
Registered session 2 start (start_session CLI); read project-guidance, lessons-learned (active tier), authoring guide, spec, S1 findings; confirmed API keys present.

Webview state persistence: vscode.setState/getState round-trip for gsState (tier/parallel/budget/zeroMethod) via pure restoreGsState in gettingStartedHtml.js; one-shot durable tier seed applied from snapshot payload; retainContextWhenHidden evaluated and deliberately not enabled (documented at the registration site).

Durable markers: new utils/tierMarkerStore.ts owning .dabbler/tier + .dabbler/verification-mode (write-through), tolerant readers, resolveDurableTier precedence (marker -> router-config inference -> null), repoRootForSpecPath; scaffoldConsumerRepo writes both markers on every scaffold.

Prompt truth: copySessionSetGenPrompt resolves marker-first; buildSessionGenPrompt ?? "full" fallback removed; guidance worded by tier source (selected / inferred / none-recorded) so no fabricated selection rationale; asTier case-insensitive + fail-loud with operator-visible rejection at all three callsites.

Tier-mismatch tree advisory (t! marker + tooltip through the existing tier-marker channel, workspaceTierMarker read once per root); switchTier guardrail + marker write-through anchored on repoRootForSpecPath(set.specPath) (A11 path-coupling fix); client.js innerHTML audit: all dynamic sinks escape via escHtml/escAttr, no unescaped set-name sink found.

Layer-2 suites authored via routed test-generation (gemini-pro, $0.06) and adapted: tierMarkerStore round-trips/precedence, restoreGsState teardown replay incl. Set 076 regression, asTier fail-loud contract, scaffold marker writes, prompt tier-truth matrix, mismatch advisory matrix + readSessionSets fixtures. Routed code-review over the session diff (opus, $0.57, gpt-5.4 auto-verify): 1 Major + 4 Minor + 2 verifier Majors adjudicated -- tierDirty seed guard, merge-preserving setState, rider-first prompt resolution, verificationMode narrowing, operator-visible webview rejections, advisory comment/wording fixes; 2 findings refuted with evidence (no third terminal state; written[] already all-posix). Raw review saved as s2-code-review.md.

Routed gate: REQUIRED (blast-radius + breadth; verdict recorded). Cross-provider verification (gpt-5.4): round 1 ISSUES_FOUND (S077-S2-V1-001 cross-root state bleed; S077-S2-V1-002 sticky tierDirty) -- both fixed (rootId payload+scoping, lastSeed semantics); round 2 confirmed 001 + found the 002 wiring residual (same-root seed change); round 3 VERIFIED the (rootId,tierSeed) tuple completion. Raw rounds saved as s2-verification*.md; structured findings in s2-issues.json. Suites at close: pytest 2268/5/0, tsc clean, mocha 962/0, Playwright 18/18 locally (documented palette-timing flake on loaded runs, all pass on re-run).

Three-way setup choice implemented: Lightweight-only verificationMode block in step 1 (verificationModeBlockHtml, mirror of the Full-only budget block); gsState gains verificationMode/modeDirty/lastModeSeed with marker-seed semantics mirroring the S2 tier contract (restoreGsState 4th param); build-structure and build-session-sets riders narrowed fail-loud in routeGettingStartedAction (asVerificationModeRider/resolveVerificationMode); threaded through structureOnlyContext (A11 hardcode replaced) into the scaffold marker write and into buildSessionGenPrompt (exemplar renders operator mode on Lightweight + dedicated-sessions guidance line; palette path reads the .dabbler/verification-mode marker).

A10: pythonPresent host probe (probePythonPresenceCore: explicit setting -> workspace venv -> PATH scan skipping the WindowsApps Store alias) carried on GettingStartedPayload and rendered as a prominent tier-independent step-1 warning (pythonWarningHtml); scaffold pre-flight is the first side-effect-free step of buildProjectStructureNoPrompt (before git init and every durable write) failing friendly via describeMissingPython; setupVerification.runChangeWriter gains the interpreterResolves pre-spawn check (S1 bundle A fold).

Troubleshooting appendix verified via routed documentation review (gemini-pro, $0.016): remedies across the form warning / pre-flight explainer / appendix are consistent; one GAP accepted and landed (appendix now explains that the extension Python check deliberately skips the Microsoft Store WindowsApps alias, so the warning can fire even when typing python seems to work). Cold-start goldens regenerated for the 2-line appendix change (x2 tiers); dist recompiled; drift guard green (25 passed incl. dist-in-sync and stale-framing over the new form copy).

Critique M6: the auto-opened getting-started doc now leads with the recorded-tier callout when the workspace carries a durable tier resolution (renderTierAwareGettingStarted/tierCalloutMarkdown, pure + unit-tested; materialized into globalStorage so neither the workspace copy nor the bundle is mutated; no durable signal => doc opens as-is).

Layer-2 suites extended via routed test-generation (gemini-pro, $0.097, adapted; adaptation caught a real portability defect: the PATH probe now follows its platform PARAMETER for join/delimiter semantics so win32 fixtures pin on POSIX CI). New/updated suites: verification-mode block + python warning + restoreGsState mode-seed matrix, probe family, rider narrowing + dispatch threading, gen-prompt mode truth, detection thunk gating, tier-aware doc, and the M7 no-artifacts-on-failure scaffold pre-flight regression. Layer-3: new rendering-only scenario (lightweight+dedicated markers => Lightweight radio checked, verification block visible w/ dedicated checked, no budget block, python warning present-hidden). mocha 1023/0, tsc clean, pytest 2268/5/0.

Routed code-review over the session diff (opus $0.60, gpt-5.4 auto-verify ISSUES_FOUND; raw in s3-code-review.md). Adjudicated: FIXED Major 1 (picked-folder path no longer opens/reloads on a pre-flight refusal), FIXED verifier Major (probe default now requires a regular FILE, so a directory-valued pythonPath fails the pre-flight before any durable write; real-tmpdir regression test), FIXED Minor 3 (structureOnlyContext narrows to the closed union), FIXED Minor 8 (fence-aware H1 detection + test); DOCUMENTED Minor 6 (py-launcher/PATHEXT coupled limitation is deliberate probe/spawn consistency) and Minor 7 (no-relative-links constraint of the globalStorage materialization); REFUTED Minor 4 (webview assets ship with the host, so the newer-webview/older-host rider-version window does not exist in this architecture); Minor 2 subsumed by Major 1 fix (no reload on the failure path, the toast persists); DEFERRED Minor 5 (sync fs probe per snapshot — perf-only, matches the S1 deferral of the async-scan architecture change). Suites after fixes: mocha 1025/0, tsc clean, Playwright form specs re-run green, dist recompiled, drift guard green.

Routed gate: REQUIRED (blast-radius + multi-module + breadth; verdict logged). Cross-provider session verification round 1 (gpt-5.4, $0.26, raw in s3-verification.md): ISSUES FOUND -- one Major (S077-S3-V1-001): the probe counted python3 on POSIX while the scaffold bootstrap still spawned bare python, so a python3-only host could pass pre-flight, git-init, then die at venv creation. Fixed: resolveBootstrapPythonCore/resolveScaffoldBootstrapPython give the pre-flight and the spawn ONE shared interpreter list (python3-then-python on POSIX, python-only on win32, explicit setting decides alone); buildProjectStructureNoPrompt spawns the resolved bootstrap; five regression tests added (mocha 1030/0, tsc clean, dist recompiled, drift guard green). Round 2 narrow re-verify (gpt-5.4, $0.06, raw in s3-verification-round-2.md): VERIFIED, no fix-introduced regressions, no nits.

ai-assignment S3 actuals filled; S4 recommendation confirmed by routed analysis (gemini-pro, $0.003): Claude Code claude-fable-5 @ effort=high. Disposition authored; commit + push + close_session + notification follow.

A3 closed: close_session.run() resolves Lightweight mode once (_resolve_no_router_for_run; CLI > env > spec, cache-immune) and threads it through all three no_router branches. A4: soft gate is content-aware via the new ai_router/external_verification.py parser (round semantics, latest round wins, WAIVED+reason token; empty/verdict-less file soft-warns like absence). A8: gate stands down when read_verification_mode says dedicated-sessions. Mechanical hardening: RESULT_TO_EXIT_CODE['aborted_at_soft_gate']=4, TOCTOU _is_already_closed re-check inside the lock, close_is_terminal computed once for the dv/pac/contract gate chain, corrective guidance printed before the interactive [y/N]. Parser unit tests (21) + reworked no-router close tests (19).

A12 closed: _backfill_payload disambiguates on activity-log entries length via _activity_log_has_entries (cleanly-parsed empty entries => not-started; entries present incl. no-dateTime legacy, malformed, or unexpected shapes preserve the conservative in-progress inference). Regression tests replay the authored-today/started-tomorrow flow through backfill and the read_status lazy-synth path.

S1 bundle F landed (not deferred): four boundary writers + _propagate_total_sessions/_finalize_total_sessions_from_entries routed through _atomic_write_json with a Windows os.replace PermissionError retry (3x50ms); read_raw_session_state narrowed to (FileNotFoundError, JSONDecodeError, UnicodeError) so PermissionError propagates; register_session_start refuses re-opening a session already in completedSessions; backfill_session_state_files re-checks existence inside its loop (TOCTOU); _finalize uses max(sessions) not len(sessions). 7 new regression tests; one v2 fixture corrected (it abused force=True for a mid-set close).

Authored docs/templates/consumer-bootstrap/cross-provider-verification.md.template (engine-facing: inputs, devil's-advocate stance with materiality bar, VERIFIED/ISSUES_FOUND(+severities)/WAIVED(+required reason) grammar in lockstep with the parser, required write-the-artifact output, Copilot second-chat/model-picker recipe). Wired into TemplateBundle + renderConsumerBootstrap + renderStructureBootstrap (renders to docs/dabbler/cross-provider-verification.md); extension ensure-writes/refreshes it idempotently before each Evaluate prompt (ensureCrossProviderVerificationDoc, critique M2 - installed base needs no re-bootstrap). Routed documentation review (gemini-pro $0.016 + gpt-5-4-mini auto-verify): no material findings against the doc (the one flagged omission was in the reviewer's own summary; the doc carries the git-status caveat verbatim). Cold-start goldens regenerated; dist recompiled; drift guard green.

The three Evaluate prompts rewritten pointer-style (A2/A9): shared opener points at docs/dabbler/cross-provider-verification.md with the one-line missing-doc fallback; bodies shrunk to a Scope paragraph; operator-criteria trailer preserved with a new 8000-char size guard (S1 bundle A Minor); shared non-negotiable close names the exact external-verification.md path the reviewing engine itself must write. openExternalVerificationDoc now seeds a minimal round header (set, date, Round 1, Verdict: PENDING - deliberately unrecognized by the parser so an unfilled template still soft-warns).

Layer-2 coverage extended via routed test-generation (gemini-pro, $0.033, adapted): pointer-opener/artifact-close/trailer-order tests for all three Evaluate prompts, the 8000-char criteria size guard, ensureCrossProviderVerificationDoc sandbox tests (create/refresh/idempotent/missing-bundle), and the seeded external-verification template. Adaptation again treated routed test-gen as a review surface: the generated ensure-write fixture faked a one-file bundle (loadTemplateBundle reads every file, so it would return false) and used BDD beforeEach in the TDD-ui suite; both corrected. Unit suite 1047 passing. Python-side tests hand-authored earlier in-session (21 parser + 5 A12 + 7 robustness + reworked no-router/gate fixtures).

Routed code-review over the session diff (opus $0.55, raw in s4-code-review.md; gpt-5.4 auto-verify ISSUES_FOUND). Adjudication: the auto-verifier's Major is REAL and fixed - the spec-review prompt (pre-work) wrote the same artifact the soft gate accepts, so a spec-only VERIFIED round could launder the gate; fix = parser-visible 'Scope: specification' round marker (parser exposes scope; gate soft-warns when the latest round is spec-scoped; spec-review prompt instructs the marker; canonical doc documents it; 8 new tests). The auto-verifier also refuted opus's Critical (prior_completed IS initialized above the hunk) and its PermissionError Major (spec-mandated by-design) - both confirmed against code, no action. Opus Minors applied: stale main() comment corrected (run() resolves per-set deterministically, manual lockstep note), resolution moved below the repair/idempotency short-circuits, backfill return-contract docstring updated, WAIVED Reason-adjacency documented in the template. Deferred-with-reason: max() outlier inflation (entries already int-filtered; garbage-in, same class as the len undercount), ensure-write working-tree side effect (idempotent by content-compare; surfacing it is S6 UAT material), read-vs-parse factoring suggestion (distinct missing/unreadable/no-verdict messaging is intentional).

Routed gate: REQUIRED (blast-radius + multi-module + breadth; verdict logged). Cross-provider session verification (gpt-5.4): round 1 ISSUES_FOUND - two real parser defects (underscore-emphasis variants unparsed; WAIVED reason accepted across a blank line, looser than the documented grammar), both fixed with regression tests (s4-issues.json). Round 2 (narrow) found one consequence-edge: a later malformed WAIVED left an earlier verdict standing - fixed (nulls the round verdict, fail-toward-louder; s4-issues-round-2.json). Round 3 clean in substance ('No issues found') but token-less; round 4 was the L-064-7 schema-only restatement with max_tier pinned to the verifier's own tier: VERIFIED. Suites at close: pytest 2314/5/0, tsc clean, mocha 1050 passing, Playwright 19/19 local serial.

ai-assignment S4 actuals filled; S5 recommendation confirmed by routed analysis (gemini-pro, $0.005): Claude Code claude-fable-5 @ effort=high. Lessons cited via cite_lessons (L-064-3, L-064-7, L-064-9, L-071-1). Final full pytest 2317/5/0. Disposition authored; commit + push + close_session + notification follow.

Session 5 registered (start_session, claude-code/anthropic/claude-fable-5). Read guidance docs + spec + S1 findings. Implemented Feature-5 gate work in ai_router: cross_provider_satisfied/work_session_pairs shared predicate (A6 engine-or-provider, missing data fails the provider arm closed), validator rewritten onto it with M5 legacy-posture corrective + quoted as_posix set-dir; start-time same-(engine,provider) refusal in both typed-start and handoff paths (M1); bundle-C _capture_* policy calls added to both typed paths; bundle-E robustness (_write_json_atomic shared by envelope seeder + minimal-log creation; derive_state blank-verdict+no-envelope pre-terminal ambiguity now AWAITING_HUMAN, terminal keeps legacy closed-verified). Affected suites green pre-new-tests (135 passed).

Feature 4: new ai_router/pending_verification.py (owed-state notices derived from derive_workflow_state + the S4 external-verification parser; WAIVED latest round = durable opt-out, bare absence always nags; most-recent-completed-sibling scan; MAX_NOTICES cap; side-effect-free readers) + loud advisory ASCII banner wired into start_session work path. Tests: per-state unit coverage + CLI integration incl. --no-router (banner fires with zero router config).

A7: Explorer mode derivation now prefers the durable activity-log record. TS mirrors added to tierLegibility.ts (durableVerificationModeFrom last-valid-record-wins; deriveWorkflowState seven-state ladder incl. the S5 blank-verdict adjudication); fileSystem.ts scan applies record over spec seed and derives workflowState for Mode-B rows (readLatestIssuesEnvelope mirror). Layer-2 fixtures incl. the failed-seed-alignment drift case (record dedicated-sessions vs stale out-of-band seed).

Feature 5 UI: Start Next Session copy action auto-routes by derived state (verification kickoff / remediation handoff; awaiting-human deliberately not auto-routed); kickoff prompt rewritten pointer-style per A9 (+ dabbler-ai-router >= 0.27.0 version-skew line, critique M6); new buildRemediationHandoffPrompt; row description gains 'verification owed'/'remediation owed' words; progressText gains the plusFraction '+' (S1 bundle B). Set 062 kickoff tests updated to the new contract. tsc clean; mocha 1093 passing.

Docs: workflow doc Mode B section documents the engine-or-provider gate, the sanctioned single-engine Copilot model-picker pattern, the M1 start-time refusal, legacy null-provider posture (M5), and the new owed-state surfaces (banner + Explorer words + auto-route); every different-engine echo updated (L-065-1). Consumer AGENTS.md tail template gains the Copilot-locked pattern bullet; cold-start goldens regenerated (AGENTS.md x2 tiers) and dist recompiled (dist-in-sync clean).

Routed code-review over the S5 diff (sonnet, auto-verified by gemini-pro; raw in s5-code-review.md). Adjudication: [Critical] TS setTerminal claim REJECTED (false premise - liveSession.status is populated for parsed complete sets; raw-status mirror is the faithful one) but surfaced a real adjacent gap, fixed: cancelled Mode-B rows no longer show owed words (terminal suppression in verificationOwedText + regression test). [Major] unconditional --handoff fix REJECTED (would fail loud in the common awaiting-remediation case); remediation prompt prose tightened to resume-vs-open guidance instead. [Major] TS/Py remediation-divergence claim refuted by the auto-verifier and confirmed false against code. [Minor] banner-before-refusal REJECTED (typed dispatch returns before the banner call). [Minor] round-1 filename collision DEFERRED (mirror fidelity; sanctioned writer never emits -round-1). Verifier's banner-I/O note ACCEPTED-AS-IS (one small JSON read per sibling once per session boundary; same walk precedent as summarize_drift). Post-fix: tsc clean, mocha 1094 passing, dist recompiled.

Full pass green (pytest 2372/5/0 after fixing the new module's guarded bare import; tsc clean; mocha 1095; Playwright 19/19 serial). Routed gate: REQUIRED (blast-radius + multi-module + breadth; verdict logged). Cross-provider session verification (gpt-5.4): round 1 token-less, three unspecified-severity findings treated blocking (L-071-1) - banner <other-engine> wording fixed (+text-locking test), TS status-wiring claim refuted with a clarity refactor + the verifier-requested terminal-branch fixture, close-gate any-historical-round claim dispositioned advisory-disagreement (locked Set 057 semantics; M1 guardrail closes the front door; escalated to operator in disposition). Round 2 (narrow): findings 1-2 verified; one Major that was an evidence gap (untracked file invisible to git diff - L-064-9 class). Round 3 (file source supplied directly): VERIFIED. s5-issues.json persisted with dispositions.

Session 6 registered via start_session (claude-code/anthropic/claude-fable-5/medium). Required reading done (project-guidance, lessons-learned, authoring guide, session-state schema, workflow doc). Committed the stranded S5 close-out state writes as Close Set 077 session 5 (ba3a0d3). Kicked off the full three-layer baseline.

Full three-layer pass green pre-release: pytest 2372 passed / 5 skipped / 0 failed; npx tsc --noEmit clean; mocha 1095 passing; Playwright 19/19. No test pins version strings, so the 0.27.0/0.34.0 bumps do not invalidate the run.

Version bumps applied: pyproject 0.26.2 -> 0.27.0; ai_router.__version__ 0.26.1 (stale, missed at 0.26.2) -> 0.27.0; extension package.json + lockfile 0.33.1 -> 0.34.0; router-config.yaml metadata.pricing_reviewed refreshed to 2026-07-03 after web-verifying Opus 4.8 $5/$25, Sonnet 4.6 $3/$15, GPT-5.4 $2.50/$15 against published pricing (Gemini 2.5 prices unchanged/stable).

Ad-hoc per-set UAT checklist authored via route(uat-plan-generation) (opus $0.30, auto-verified by gpt-5.4): 14 operator-walk items covering the make-uat-workspace matrix sweep, three fresh-scaffold setup-choice walks, tier-leak stress (tierDirty), Python warning + no-artifacts pre-flight, the Copilot-persona out-of-band round-trip (banner-before -> engine writes artifact -> gate -> banner-clears), Mode-B single-engine gate pass + same-pair refusal, version-skew loud failure, and owed-state auto-routing. Verifier issue 1 (empty Passes/Feedback/Result keys) fixed mechanically; issue 2 (Python warning repeated per scaffold walk) dismissed: the pythonPresent probe is computed once before any tier choice, dedicated walks 6-7 cover it - flagged for operator adjudication at the walk. Ad-hoc floor validated: every non-judgment item carries ProgrammaticVerification.

Required end-of-set path-aware critique run via ai_router.pull_critique (defaults per L-067-1: openai gpt-5.4 + google gemini-2.5-pro, natural full-repo sandbox, diff base 6fc81da^). Both arms converged with substantive summaries and ZERO findings; artifact path-aware-critique.json written, level=required, >=2 distinct providers satisfied. No remediation loop needed (L-070-1 converges on no-new-code trivially).

UAT authoring surfaced a fixture gap: the uat-matrix had no remediation-owed row, so checklist walks 1/14 would dead-end. Added fixture 007-echo-the-greeting (Mode B, verification round ISSUES_FOUND with open s3-issues.json finding, remediation session in flight - the post-handoff shape) + README row + uatMatrixFixtures.test.ts pinning row (16 passing; corrected my initial plusFraction expectation: the + drops once a typed session grows the count, the 006 rule). Amended checklist walks 1/10/14 to concrete fixture rows and added the optional WAIVED no-nag banner check to walk 10. Drift guard 25/25; mocha 1096 passing; tsc clean. Local VSIX 0.34.0 built and installed; make-uat-workspace smoke-ran clean.

Routed gate: REQUIRED (blast-radius + multi-module + breadth + build-ci-config; verdict logged). Cross-provider session verification (gpt-5.4, round 1): VERIFIED - version bumps, CHANGELOGs incl. coordinated rollback note, repository-reference pending-release update, UAT checklist, fixture 007 row, and critique artifact all confirmed against the conventions block. Raw output saved to s6-verification.md (never edited).

S6 work committed (51fc437) and pushed; Test workflow run 28681416103 in progress (drift guards + template snapshot already green). Session pauses at the operator gates per Step 10: UAT walk + attestation on the local VSIX 0.34.0, VSCE_PAT renewal, and the v0.27.0 / vsix-v0.34.0 tag pushes. close_session deferred to the post-attestation turn.

Test workflow run 28681416103 GREEN on 51fc437 (all matrix jobs). Built the operator UAT starter kit at C:/temp/uat-077 (Set 062 precedent): regenerated uat-matrix workspace (incl. the new 007 remediation-owed row), four empty scaffold-walk folders, pre-baked oob-roundtrip repo (banner->artifact->gate walk 8-10) and modeb-gate repo (walks 11-12) each git-committed for one-command reset, modeb-gate-oldrouter copy + a 0.26.2 PyPI venv for the walk-13 skew contrast, and README-UAT-WALK.md mapping all 14 walks to exact commands. Smoke-tested: same-pair refusal (exit 3, no writes), copilot/openai start accepted, pending-verification banner names 001-greeting-core, 0.26.2 accepts the doomed start silently. FOUND AND FIXED during smoke: the repo venv (copied from the c:/Users clone) had its editable dabbler-ai-router install pointing at the STALE c:/Users/denmi/source/repos/dabbler-ai-orchestration checkout (stuck at 6fc81da) - out-of-repo invocations (incl. extension pythonPath-pinned row actions) silently ran pre-S1 code; repointed d:/Projects venv to its own repo (0.27.0) and restored the c:/Users venv to its own checkout. Lessons-learned candidate for Step 9.

OPERATOR DECISION (2026-07-04): UAT suspended mid-walk over instruction quality - steps required guessing, could not distinguish product bugs from misread instructions, written above the needed reading level with shared-context assumptions. Set 077 stays OPEN (session 6 not closed); deferred until after Set 078 and a dedicated UAT-improvement set (candidate input: operator UAT DSL at D:/Projects/dabbler-uat-dsl; goal: everything Playwright-testable is Playwright-tested BEFORE human UAT). Then 077 UAT is revisited and 078 UAT run under the improved experience. Release gates remain open: UAT attestation, VSCE_PAT renewal, tag pushes v0.27.0 + vsix-v0.34.0, Marketplace publish (0.34.0 VSIX sideloadable meanwhile). Two operator directives captured as durable guidance in docs/planning/project-guidance.md (UAT-for-a-stranger + prefer-removal-over-addition) and pre-authoring notes in docs/planning/uat-improvement-notes.md.
